records.display_name: 37 community meetings for M15 SBS

payload.claim_text: The project team participated in a total of 37 community meetings between May 2009 and June 2011.
payload.description: Extensive community outreach including CAC meetings, open houses, CB presentations, and direct outreach to businesses and institutions.
payload.subject: M15 SBS outreach

records.raw_text: a total of 37 community meetings between May 2009 and June 2011

records.display_name: 7,000+ summonses per month from bus lane cameras

payload.claim_text: By June 2011 more than 7,000 summonses per month were being issued by the camera system for bus lane enforcement.
payload.description: Bus lane camera enforcement on First and Second Avenues.
payload.subject: bus lane camera enforcement

records.raw_text: by June 2011 more than 7,000 summonses per month were being issued by the camera system

records.display_name: New low-floor articulated buses for M15 SBS

payload.claim_text: NYCT purchased new low-floor articulated buses for M15 SBS, the first low-floor articulated buses used in New York City, and the first buses to include a third set of doors.
payload.description: New low-floor articulated buses with third doors, quieter, smoother ride, and 20% better fuel mileage.
payload.subject: M15 SBS buses

records.raw_text: NYCT purchased new low-floor articulated buses. These were not only the first low-floor articulated buses used in New York City, but were also the first buses to include a third set of doors to help speed passenger flows.

records.display_name: M15 SBS maintained traffic flow

payload.claim_text: SBS generated a significant improvement in transit service in this constrained corridor, created space for safe bicycling facilities and pedestrian safety improvements, all while maintaining general traffic flow along the corridor.
payload.description: SBS improved transit service while maintaining traffic flow and adding bicycle and pedestrian safety improvements.
payload.subject: M15 SBS

records.raw_text: SBS generated a significant improvement in transit service in this constrained corridor, created space for safe bicycling facilities and pedestrian safety improvements, all while maintaining general traffic flow along the corridor.

records.display_name: 11,662 summonses issued by Eagle Team

payload.claim_text: As of Oct 1, 2011, NYCT Security had issued 11,662 summonses on M15 SBS, as well as 10,129 warnings in addition to 70,000 instances where they provided assistance.
payload.description: Fare enforcement by NYCT Security Eagle Team on M15 SBS.
payload.subject: Eagle Team fare enforcement

records.raw_text: NYCT Security had issued 11,662 summonses on M15 SBS, as well as 10,129 warnings

records.display_name: M15 Select Bus Service on First and Second Avenues

payload.description: Implementation of Select Bus Service on the M15 bus route along First and Second Avenues in Manhattan, including offset bus lanes, curbside bus lanes, off-board fare collection, transit signal priority, enhanced stations, new low-floor articulated buses, and complete streets elements including protected bicycle lanes and pedestrian safety islands.

records.display_name: Curbside Bus Lanes on First and Second Avenues

payload.description: Curbside bus lanes in effect from 7:00am-10:00am and 2:00pm-7:00pm; 10:00am-2:00pm reserved for commercial vehicle loading.

locations_normalized.raw_text: First Avenue and Second Avenue, Manhattan

records.raw_text: Curbside bus lanes are typically in effect from 7:00am-10:00am and 2:00pm-7:00pm

payload.date_text: expected to be implemented by early 2012

records.display_name: Protected Bicycle Lanes on First and Second Avenues

payload.description: Parking-protected bicycle paths with floating parking lane creating a physical barrier between traffic and bicycle lane, including mixing zones at intersections.

locations_normalized.raw_text: First Avenue from 1st Street to 34th Street; Second Avenue between 34th and 23rd Streets and between 14th and Houston Streets, Manhattan

records.raw_text: parking protected bicycle paths, where the bicycle facility is located on the left side of the street, between parked cars and the sidewalk

records.display_name: Offset Bus Lanes on First and Second Avenues

payload.description: Offset bus lanes located in the second lane from the right curb, in effect at all times, preserving curbside parking or loading activity.
payload.locations: First Avenue and Second Avenue, Manhattan

locations_normalized.raw_text: First Avenue and Second Avenue, Manhattan

records.raw_text: Offset bus lanes are located in the second lane from the right curb of each avenue and are in effect at all times.

records.display_name: Off-Board Fare Collection on M15 SBS

payload.description: Proof-of-payment system where riders pay before boarding using MetroCard or coin fare machines at stations, allowing boarding through any of three doors.

locations_normalized.raw_text: M15 SBS stations along First and Second Avenues, Manhattan

records.raw_text: riders pay their fare before boarding, using MetroCard or coin fare machines located at each station to obtain a receipt
